title: BBS mod
description: Animation studio and content creation tool
body:
![BBS mod](https://i.imgur.com/zffMvDJ.png)

[CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/bbs-mod) – [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/project/bbs-mod) – [Wiki](https://github.com/mchorse/bbs-mod-wiki/wiki)  

**BBS mod** is the content creator's Minecraft mod. It allows content creators create animations, roleplays, and machinimas within Minecraft! However, BBS mod's strongest point is creating animations.

It's made for Fabric **1.20.4** and **1.20.1**. However, **1.20.1** build can be used on Forge with Sinytra Connector mod.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/X7bTb7QI-V8" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

You can donate on [Patreon](https://www.patreon.com/McHorse), [Afdian](https://afdian.com/a/McHorse), or [Boosty](https://boosty.to/mchorse).

### Feature set

- Basic player's actions recording and playback.
- Keyframe-based replay editor.
- Clip-based camera editor.
- [Blockbench](https://www.blockbench.net/) model support (animations, meshes, variables, etc.).
- Partial [Snowstorm](https://snowstorm.app/) particles support.
- Model blocks, which allow you to place and hold custom custom models.
- Form system, which allows mixing animate models, blocks, items, images, particles, etc. to create appearances for actors and model blocks.
- And lots of useful UI tweaks...

In comparison to Blockbuster mod, BBS mod's user experience was drastically improved! It's still not on par with Blockbuster mod feature-wise though.

### Installing

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/O7g-el24Yq8" frameborder="0" allowfullscreen></iframe>

To install BBS mod, you need Fabric and Fabric API. Put Fabric API and BBS mod into your `mods` folder, and that should do it!

#### Installing on Forge

Thanks to Sinytra Connector mod, it's possible to use BBS mod's `1.20.1` build on Forge! Install Sinytra Connector, its complementary mods and it should run! Don't expect Optifine to work with BBS mod! Use Sodium and Iris corresponding port mods.

### Tutorials

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/3wRAUymltj0" frameborder="0" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Check out this [YouTube playlist](https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLLnllO8nnzE-JIfqDQ5HnD7BN2V6tdbci) for the basics tutorial series. Check out [McHorse's Creations](https://www.youtube.com/@McHorsesCreations/videos) YouTube channel for more BBS mod tutorials and videos.

### Examples

You can see all of the videos, known to me, made with BBS mod in this [playlist](https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLLnllO8nnzE_suot6d5FnWWqIZy2i-K_x).
